name: Veritas Technologies
description: Veritas Technologies is a global leader in multi-cloud data management, providing solutions that help organizations harness the power of their information. The company specializes in data protection, availability, and insights, enabling businesses to ensure the recoverability and compliance of their critical data across complex hybrid and multi-cloud environments. Serving a vast majority of the Fortune Global 500, Veritas empowers enterprises to manage, protect, and optimize their data infrastructure, reducing risks and costs while accelerating digital transformation initiatives in an increasingly data-driven world.
